title: Dye-terminator DNA sequencing
author: Diep R R Ganguly
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bhxmj7k6

steps.title: If sequencing a PCR amplified DNA...
steps.instruction: If sequencing a PCR amplified DNA fragment, gel purify target DNA band based on expected fragment size (if multiple bands present). Perform gel purification with Wizard SV Gel and PCR Clean-Up System (Promega, as per attached Manufacterer's instructions) followed by enzymatic clean-up (hydrolyze excess primers and nucleotides) with the following reaction: %s %s Incubate the above in a thermal cycle for: 37 °C for 30 minutes 80 °C for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Perform sequencing PCR in PCR tubes...
steps.instruction: Perform sequencing PCR in PCR tubes (or 96-well plate) with BigDye Terminator cycling kit and forward or reverse primers. %s %s 5x reaction buffer=400 mM TRIS, 10 mM MgCl 2

steps.title: Run the following thermal cycling protocol
steps.instruction: Run the following thermal cycling protocol: 1 min at 96 °C 30-40 cycles: 96 °C for 10 seconds, 50 °C for 5 seconds, and 60 °C for 4 min. Hold at 4-12 °C.

steps.title: Transfer PCR reaction to nuclease-free eppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Transfer PCR reaction to nuclease-free eppendorf tube. To the reaction, add 2.5 µL of 125 mM EDTA (make sure it touches bottom of tube).

steps.title: Add 30 µl of 100% ethanol, mix well (inversion)
steps.instruction: Add 30 µl of 100% ethanol, mix well (inversion).

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C at max speed for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C at max speed for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Discard supernatant and add 50 µl of ice-cold 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and add 50 µl of ice-cold 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C at max speed for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C at max speed for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Discard supernatant and allow to air-dry...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and allow to air-dry in the dark for >15 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet (likely transparent) in 7
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet (likely transparent) in 7.5 µL HiDi Formamide (add to any empty wells). Incubate at RT for 5 minutes then transfer to plate. Spin down briefly.

steps.title: Incubate plate at 95 °C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate plate at 95 °C for 3 minutes (denature) then place immediately on ice. Spin down briefly.

steps.title: Submit for sequencing on 3130X genetic analyser (Applied Biosystems)
steps.instruction: Submit for sequencing on 3130X genetic analyser (Applied Biosystems). Keep samples on ice.
